sourceContext.lead: Translated and adapted from Kamigame's Harley guide.
sourceContext.citationText: Source page: Harley Guide - Star Savior | Kamigame.

hero.title: Harley
hero.summary: Harley starts best on HP (4pc) + Hit (2pc) with Speed necklace and HP% ring. From there, branch into the High-end route and the PvP route as your gear options widen.

combatIdentity.title: Combat Identity
combatIdentity.summary: Harley feels best once Speed, Crit Rate, and Crit DMG are online, giving the first rotation a much steadier payoff.
bullets: Main stats stay on Speed necklace and HP% ring.
Substat focus: Speed, Crit Rate, Crit DMG, and HP%.
Journey: Hard route leans toward CRIT - EX5.

skillRotation.title: Skill Rotation
skillRotation.summary: Skill investment is cleanest as Ultimate >= Special >= Basic, with the first cooldown setting the pace for the full rotation.

steps.title: Open with Ultimate
steps.detail: Lead with the highest-invested cooldown so the opener starts on the strongest possible breakpoint.

steps.title: Cash in on Special
steps.detail: Special is usually the next meaningful breakpoint once the opener lands and should carry the mid-cycle payoff.

steps.title: Fill with Basic
steps.detail: Use Basic between cooldowns while you keep Speed and Crit Rate stable on gear.

steps.title: Upgrade toward the final target
steps.detail: Budget target is 3 / 3 / 3, with 7 / 7 / 8 as the long-term skill finish.

buildPlanner.title: Build Planner
buildPlanner.summary: Start on the PvE / PvP line with HP (4pc) + Hit (2pc) and Speed necklace and HP% ring. Move into the High-end route and the PvP route once the baseline is stable.

sets.label: PvE / PvP
sets.note: PvE / PvP keeps SPD on the necklace and HP% on the ring.

sets.label: High-end
sets.note: High-end keeps SPD on the necklace and HP% on the ring.

sets.label: PvP
sets.note: PvP keeps SPD on the necklace and HP% on the ring.

priorities: Substats: SPD, Crit Rate, Crit DMG, HP(%)

targetStats.summary: Lock Speed necklace and HP% ring, then stack Speed, Crit Rate, Crit DMG, and HP% through substats.

upgradePath.title: Priority
items: Breakthrough priority: ★☆☆ Works fine at base copy
Substat focus: Speed, Crit Rate, Crit DMG, and HP%

journeyHard.title: Recommended Cards
journeyHard.summary: Core line: Charlotte and Emilly. Fill the remaining slots with Waltz Asherah or Lacy, Bunny Claire, and Petra or Naru.

items.label: Passive
items.title: You Bullying My Boys?
items.summary: Harley's passive matters more once the core stat line is online and the rotation is already stable.

items.label: Basic
items.title: Let's Go, Dave!
items.summary: Use the basic to bridge cooldowns; it should stay behind the two higher-impact skills in upgrade priority.

items.label: Special
items.title: You Wanna Go?
items.summary: Special is the next major breakpoint after the opener and usually carries the mid-cycle payoff.

items.label: Ultimate
items.title: Chicken Race!
items.summary: Ultimate anchors the opener and stays at the top of the investment order for this build.
